name: spreadsheet_automation
description: Ability to create and read Excel spreadsheets with structured data
instructions_md: To work with Excel files: 1) Use create_excel_sheet to build a new workbook — always provide headers as a list of strings first. 2) Pass rows as a list-of-lists matching the header column order. 3) Use read_excel_sheet to inspect existing files — specify sheet_name for multi-sheet workbooks. 4) When updating an existing sheet, read it first, modify the data in memory, then write a new file with overwrite=True. 5) Numeric values in rows will be stored as numbers; ensure data types match the intended column type.
